subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto existence is, verily, the Most Great Proof for all who are in the heavens and on earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن فی الامکان و انه لهو البرهان الاعظم لمن فی السموات و الارض
subcodes.subjects: @blind imitation [taqlid], @Manifestation of God as sun, @suffering and imprisonment
